steps.title: Identify the intercept
steps.content:
In the model $s=68m+320$, the constant term is the value of $s$ when $m=0$:
$$
s=68(0)+320=320
$$
So $320$ is the number of steps already counted at the start of the walk.

steps.title: Interpret the start time
steps.content: The variable $m$ is minutes after the start of the walk. Therefore $m=0$ means the moment the walk begins, so the $320$ steps were taken before the walk. The answer is D.
